# MixReflect

> Know if your track is ready to release. MixReflect gives you an instant, measured verdict — not ready, needs work, almost there, or release ready — then puts your track in front of a room of real listeners. Paste a link, get the verdict. Free to start.

MixReflect tells you whether your track is ready to release. You paste a link to your song and get an instant verdict — measured against the bar that released tracks clear — that names exactly what stands between this track and release. The /100 score is the evidence behind the verdict, not the headline. Then your track goes in front of a room of real, genre-matched listeners who react honestly, so the call isn't just a machine's.

The product is built around two co-equal pillars: the verdict first (instant, measured, ships every time), and the room second (real listeners who back it up). The verdict tells you where you stand; the room tells you how real people hear it.

## How It Works

1. Paste a link to your track (or upload it) — no account needed to start
2. Get an instant verdict on whether it's ready to release, with the blockers between you and the release bar and three concrete fixes
3. See the evidence: a score out of 100 and a five-dimension breakdown behind the verdict
4. Unlock the full report to send your track to the room — real, genre-matched listeners hear it end to end and react honestly
5. Use the verdict plus the room's reactions to decide if the track is ready to release

## What Makes It Different

- **A release verdict, not just a number** — an instant, measured call (not ready / needs work / almost there / release ready) on whether the track is ready, with the specific blockers in the way.
- **Measured against released tracks** — the verdict is grounded in the bar that tracks which actually got released clear, not vibes. (The reference corpus is in progress and illustrative numbers are flagged honestly.)
- **A room of real listeners** — genre-matched people actually hear your track end to end and react. Not AI pretending to be people, not bots, not playlist curators looking to upsell placement. The verdict ships instantly; the room follows.
- **The score is the evidence** — a /100 score across five dimensions (hook, production, retention, emotional impact, commercial pull) backs the verdict instead of being the point.
- **Three concrete fixes** with every report — specific, actionable, not vague.
- **No account needed to start** — paste a link and get your verdict.

## Pricing

- **First report — free (forever)**: your first track's complete report is free — the score out of 100, the full written read, all three fixes, and the measured waveform. No credit card required.
- **Unlock — $6.95 (one-time)**: opens a single track's full report — the complete release-readiness breakdown plus every reaction from the room of real listeners. Yours forever.
- **Unlimited — $19.95/month**: every track you submit is auto-unlocked, with unlimited full reports and the real-listener room each time. Cancel anytime.

There are no other paid tiers.

## Who It Is For

Music producers, beatmakers, singers, songwriters, and independent artists who need to know whether a track is ready to release — an instant, measured verdict plus honest reactions from a room of real listeners to back it up. Genre-agnostic: hip-hop, electronic, pop, indie, rock, R&B, and many more are all active.

## What It Is Not

- Not a playlist pitching service (unlike SubmitHub, Groover, or Playlist Push) — the listeners react honestly, they do not sell placement.
- Not AI-only feedback — real listeners back every unlocked verdict.
- Not a peer-to-peer credit-swap — you do not have to review other people's tracks to get the verdict on yours.
